JUDGE BALLATI, D.PADILLA/CSR, K.LEE/CLERK 09:15AM CAUSE CALLED FOR JURY TRIAL. ARNOLD EVJE FOR THE PLTF T.M. PATEL AND NO APPEARANCE BY THE DEFT SCOTT THOMAS. WITNESS S&E, EVID IS ID/ADMITTED AND PLTF RESTS. JUDGEMENT FOR THE PLTF. TERMS ON THE RECORD.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT THOMAS, SCOTT THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 545 JONES STREET #45, S.F. $1,571.57 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,571.57, LEASE FORFEITED, COSTS THROUGH COST BILL AND PER DIEM HOLDOVER OF $ 14.29.
